title: RRC Resources
description: An optional addon to enhance your experience with RRC Datapack Projects
body:
# RRC Resources

Our content looking a bit bland or generic? Maybe you don't speak English?

### What does this RP Provide?

This Resource Pack is made to pair with out datapack based projects. From custom textures, to translating supported items & text components, this resource pack has it all!

### Which Packs & What?

- Generic
  - Contains a custom advancement background in 1.21+
  - Custom Identifier Advancement Textures(1.21+)
- Horde Nights
  - High Level translation support
  - Some custom textures
- Mo-Variants
  - This pack is in the process of being integrated W/ v7.7.0
- Injured Effects
  - High Level translation support
- Fishing Crates
  - Low level translation support in Early Builds
    - Unlock access to early builds by becoming a [Tier 3 Supporter](https://www.ko-fi.com/rezmerainzy)
